systems.name: OpenCode Session Runtime
systems.description: Session runtime that assembles prompt context, tracks token usage, and drives telemetry-backed optimization.

containers.name: Session Pipeline
containers.description: Runtime path that prepares LLM requests and records per-round usage.

containers.name: Telemetry Projection
containers.description: State and event surfaces that feed the future context inspector sidebar.

components.name: LLM Stream Assembly
components.description: Assembles system prompt blocks and request messages; target of A111 prompt token telemetry.

components.name: Session Processor Loop
components.description: Consumes stream events, records round usage, and detects compaction; target of A112 usage telemetry.

components.name: Context Inspector Sidebar
components.description: Future accordion-based UI consuming telemetry summaries for Active Context, Prompt Blocks, and Compacted Context.

relationships.description: LLM stream events feed processor usage accounting and compaction decisions
Round usage and compaction telemetry project into context inspector cards
Prompt block breakdown informs sidebar prompt budget views
